title: Magic sword
description: Create an ancient spell that will summon a magical sword
body:
**Magic Sword** is a mod that introduces a new mystical item to Minecraft: the Ancient Scroll. This artifact contains an ancient spell that grants access to an incredibly powerful weapon — the Magic Sword.

Features:
Ancient Scroll: Disappears upon use, granting the player a Magic Sword in return.
Magic Sword: An indestructible weapon with immense power that never breaks.
Scroll Crafting: The Ancient Scroll can be crafted using paper and a rare resource — Ancient Ink.
Ancient Ink: Can be purchased from village inhabitants, adding a trade and exploration aspect to the mod.

This mod is perfect for players seeking magical enhancements and those who enjoy adding elements of exploration and interaction with villagers to their gameplay.
Explore the world to gather all the necessary components and become the wielder of a legendary weapon!
